_description: Verify-mode example: new image deployed; ride-service + notification-service gained error_logs vs 0 baseline. ride-service had 1 restart. Gate should PASS with MEDIUM risk regression annotation.

example_input.current:
ns=vroom-dev window=10m
svc|rps|err%|p99s|errlogs
user-service|9.1|0.0|0.31|0
ride-service|6.3|0.4|0.55|2
dispatch-service|5.1|0.0|0.09|0
notification-service|7.8|0.0|0.19|2

ride-service error samples (2):
  [07:40:22] ERROR pq: too many connections
  [07:40:19] ERROR context deadline exceeded

example_output.summary: Post-deploy health check passed. ride-service and notification-service each gained 2 error logs vs 0 baseline — regression flagged but below absolute WARN threshold. ride-service had 1 restart post-deploy.
example_output.kargo_annotation: WARN: ride-service +2 error_logs vs baseline (0→2) + 1 restart. notification-service +2 error_logs (0→2). Monitor post-promotion.

services.name: user-service
services.finding: Healthy. 0 error logs, 0.0% error rate, p99=0.31s. No regression vs baseline.

services.name: ride-service
services.finding: Within thresholds. 2 error logs (below WARN>10), 0.4% error rate, p99=0.55s. REGRESSION: error_logs increased from 0 to 2 post-deploy.
services.pod_health_finding: 1 restart detected post-deploy. Pod is ready.

services.name: dispatch-service
services.finding: Healthy. 0 error logs, 0.0% error rate, p99=0.09s. No regression.

services.name: notification-service
services.finding: Within thresholds. 2 error logs (below WARN>10), 0.0% error rate, p99=0.19s. REGRESSION: error_logs increased from 0 to 2 post-deploy.

recommendations: Monitor after promotion: watch ride-service error_logs for escalation above 10 (WARN threshold).
Monitor after promotion: watch notification-service error_logs; 2 new errors may indicate event-publishing compatibility issue.
Investigate ride-service startup logs — 1 restart and 2 new error_logs: [07:40:22] pq: too many connections.
